content.content:
1→import { applyDecorators } from '@nestjs/common';
     2→import { ApiOperation, ApiResponse } from '@nestjs/swagger';
     3→
     4→import { ProfileResponseDto } from './dtos';
     5→
     6→export const GetProfileOpenApi = () =>
     7→  applyDecorators(
     8→    ApiOperation({
     9→      summary: 'Get user profile',
    10→      description: 'Retrieve the authenticated user profile information',
    11→    }),
    12→    ApiResponse({
    13→      status: 200,
    14→      description: 'User profile retrieved successfully',
    15→      type: ProfileResponseDto,
    16→    }),
    17→    ApiResponse({
    18→      status: 401,
    19→      description: 'Unauthorized - user not authenticated',
    20→    }),
    21→    ApiResponse({
    22→      status: 404,
    23→      description: 'User not found',
    24→    }),
    25→  );
    26→
    27→export const UpdateProfileOpenApi = () =>
    28→  applyDecorators(
    29→    ApiOperation({
    30→      summary: 'Update user profile',
    31→      description: 'Update the authenticated user profile information',
    32→    }),
    33→    ApiResponse({
    34→      status: 200,
    35→      description: 'User profile updated successfully',
    36→      type: ProfileResponseDto,
    37→    }),
    38→    ApiResponse({
    39→      status: 400,
    40→      description: 'Bad request - invalid input data',
    41→    }),
    42→    ApiResponse({
    43→      status: 401,
    44→      description: 'Unauthorized - user not authenticated',
    45→    }),
    46→    ApiResponse({
    47→      status: 404,
    48→      description: 'User not found',
    49→    }),
    50→  );
    51→
    52→export const UpdateAddressOpenApi = () =>
    53→  applyDecorators(
    54→    ApiOperation({
    55→      summary: 'Update user address',
    56→      description: 'Update or create the authenticated user address',
    57→    }),
    58→    ApiResponse({
    59→      status: 200,
    60→      description: 'Address updated successfully',
    61→      schema: {
    62→        type: 'object',
    63→        properties: {
    64→          success: { type: 'boolean', example: true },
    65→        },
    66→      },
    67→    }),
    68→    ApiResponse({
    69→      status: 400,
    70→      description: 'Bad request - invalid input data or country not supported',
    71→    }),
    72→    ApiResponse({
    73→      status: 401,
    74→      description: 'Unauthorized - user not authenticated',
    75→    }),
    76→    ApiResponse({
    77→      status: 404,
    78→      description: 'Country not found',
    79→    }),
    80→  );
    81→
    82→export const DeleteAddressOpenApi = () =>
    83→  applyDecorators(
    84→    ApiOperation({
    85→      summary: 'Delete user address',
    86→      description: 'Delete the authenticated user address',
    87→    }),
    88→    ApiResponse({
    89→      status: 200,
    90→      description: 'Address deleted successfully',
    91→      schema: {
    92→        type: 'object',
    93→        properties: {
    94→          success: { type: 'boolean', example: true },
    95→        },
    96→      },
    97→    }),
    98→    ApiResponse({
    99→      status: 401,
   100→      description: 'Unauthorized - user not authenticated',
   101→    }),
   102→    ApiResponse({
   103→      status: 404,
   104→      description: 'Address not found',
   105→    }),
   106→  );
   107→
   108→export const GetSettingsOpenApi = () =>
   109→  applyDecorators(
   110→    ApiOperation({
   111→      summary: 'Get user settings',
   112→      description: 'Retrieve the authenticated user settings',
   113→    }),
   114→  );
   115→
   116→export const UpdateSettingsOpenApi = () =>
   117→  applyDecorators(
   118→    ApiOperation({
   119→      summary: 'Update user settings',
   120→      description: 'Update the authenticated user settings',
   121→    }),
   122→  );
   123→
